title: Hel
short_description: An atmospheric walking sim set in a grim underworld, with a secret mechanic that may offer a path to a better afterlife.
description: Hel can be played as an atmospheric walking sim set in a grim and eerie underworld, or you can try to discover the mysteries of Helheim and find a secret mechanic to escape to a better afterlife. The question is, does a better fate make you a better person?
